You'll need:
Homebrew


Useage Instructions:
download the dist folder from this project, and navigate to its.


Install Node.js using Homebrew:
bashCopybrew install node


Install a simple HTTP server:
bashCopynpm install -g serve


Running the Application
navigate to dist/ folder


Start the server:
bashCopyserve -s dist

Open your web browser and go to:
Copyhttp://localhost:3000
